title: SCP-153-D | The Impaler's Thumb
description: A finger of an ancient ruler that makes its owner animalistic and territorial.
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_b1d82adc-62e4-415c-8dcd-fcafb8f86530.png) *** **The Impaler's Thumb** mod adds __five new items__ _(SCP, documentation, label and more...),_ __one structure__, __seven new blocks__ and __50+ events__ to the game. The mod is heavily inspired by **SCP-153-D** from the **SCP Foundation Universe**. **SCP-153-D** is an old finger, lost among rubbish, said to have belonged to an ancient ruler. Anyone who handles it will become animalistic and territorial. **●** **Mod** __made by__ : TheCaptainFoxy (me) ● __Mod created with__ MCreator ● Join __my discord__ for __support/question/suggestions/sneak-peaks__ and more! _TCF Discord_ **●** Mod inspired by zcoper's mods         __FAQ__ 
Spoiler

 ► Where can I find the mod content?

SCP-153-D, its documentation, its label and all the new blocks can only be found inside the SCP-153-D containment chamber structure.

The foundation's landfill center

 

► Where does the structure spawn?

The structure spawns in every overworld biome at surface level, with approximately one structure every 3,000 blocks.

 

You can find it using /locate command

 

► How can I place the document?

Right-click to read the document.  
Shift + right-click to place it.

  *** ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_7e07df3d-9bf2-48f6-b185-3a9a9fdff401.png) *** ![SCP-153-D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/807cf951b4adc5a2345070545350f1a713f13d8b.png)

SCP-153-D | The Impaler's Thumb

*** **SCP-153-D** is an old finger, lost among rubbish, said to have belonged to an ancient ruler. **Anyone who handles it will become animalistic and territorial.** Anyone coming into physical contact with **SCP-153-D** will become **extremely territorial** and **aggressive** towards anyone from outside its territory. The owner of **SCP-153-D** will recognize their __spawn point__ or __sleeping location__ as their "**territory**". Any entity whose **own spawn point** or **sleeping location** is more than **200 blocks away** from the __owner’s territory__ will be **attacked on sight** and automatically by the owner, as long as they are holding **The Impaler’s Thumb**.  

_There is also a chance that the owner of **SCP-153-D** will express __angry thoughts__ or phrases __in chat__ or in the action bar._

  Any entity that comes into contact with **SCP-153-D** will enter a territorial state, becoming highly defensive and __periodically expressing patriotic or possessive sentiments__. Any player who has **SCP-153-D** in their inventory will become __extremely possessive and attached to it__. As a result, they will be **unable to drop the item**.  

_The player may also express their refusal or dissatisfaction through messages._

  If someone wants to __take__ **SCP-153-D** from __another player__, they must wait until the owner is __holding it in their hand__. While the item is being held, another player can **right-click the owner with an empty hand** to steal it. **SCP-153-D** can be placed by **right-clicking** on a block. It can be picked up again by **right-clicking** on the placed finger.   _**The Impaler's Thumb** is compatible with **every** mod._ ***   __Show all content__  
Spoiler

 

 

 

SCP-153-D Wrapped in Flax Cloth

SCP-153-D is first found wrapped in flax.

While wrapped in flax, SCP-153-D has no effects on the player holding it or carrying it in their inventory, allowing it to be moved safely.

Placing the flax-wrapped SCP-153-D on a block and right-clicking it will remove the flax.

 

Antique Flax Cloth

The Antique Flax Cloth is given to the player when the flax is removed from a SCP-153-D In Flax.

Shift + Right-clicking a placed SCP-153-D on the ground with the Antique Flax Cloth will rewrap it in flax.

The Antique Flax Cloth can also be found in Garbage Treasure.

Garbage & Garbage Treasure

In the structure, players may encounter Garbage and Garbage Treasure blocks.

At first glance, they look identical. Right-clicking allows you to inspect these piles of trash.

Garbage will never yield any items.

Garbage Treasure can be searched up to three times, with a chance to find various items, ranging from less useful items like dyes or bones to more valuable items like golden apples. After the third search, the Garbage Treasure block is destroyed.

   

Pitch Black Ash & Other Versions

Various types of Pitch Black Ash are another block that can be found in the structure.

The Pitch Black Ash is the result of incinerations and hydraulic presses, and they may contain important remnants.

As noted in the Trash Document, Dr. Kondraki threw SCP-153-D into the garbage, where it eventually ended up in a pile of ash.

Breaking the different Pitch Black Ash blocks will yield essential SCP items.

At first glance, all versions look identical, but:

Pitch Black Ash (Base) will drop nothing.

Pitch Black Ash with Label will drop the SCP-153-D label.

Pitch Black Ash with Document will drop the SCP-153-D descriptive document.

Pitch Black Ash with SCP-153-D will drop SCP-153-D wrapped in flax.

   

SCP-153-D Containment Chamber

SCP-153-D can only be found inside the SCP-153-D Containment Chamber/Cell.

 Landfill Center of the Foundation

The structure spawns in any Overworld biome at surface level and is rare. 

  

SCP-153-D Documents & SCP-153-D Label

The SCP-153-D documentation can be found inside the SCP-153-D Containment Chamber together with the pitch black ash block versions and the two garbages blocks.


The documents are readable, while the label provides information about the SCP’s classification and risk level.

The Trash Document describes how SCP-153-D was lost in the garbage.

As mentioned earlier, the label and document must be found among the Pitch Black Ash blocks. 

  _● SCP Documents: _        [SCP-153-D Document (ita, the only one findable)](http://fondazionescp.wikidot.com/decomm:scp-153-d) [Taking out the trash DOC](https://scp-wiki.wikidot.com/taking-out-the-trash) ● You have permission to use this mod in your modpacks! _● Check out my other Mods:_ _[My CurseForge Profile](https://www.curseforge.com/members/thecaptainfoxy/projects)_ _[My Modrinth Profile](https://modrinth.com/user/TheCaptainFoxy)_
